title: pelargonium × chelidoniifolium
intro: Pelargonium × chelidoniifolium, a hybrid species of the pelargonium family, is a flowering plant commonly known as a type of geranium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × chelidoniifolium include alleviating symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
